The model achieved a validation loss of around 1.35, which is comparable to the previous best. I need to evaluate this new model with dropout to see if the regularization improved performance.

Analysis: The training showed that the model with dropout converged after 6 epochs, similar to the previous model without dropout. The training loss decreased consistently, suggesting the model is learning effectively. The validation loss stabilized around 1.35, which is similar to the previous results. To determine if dropout improved performance, I need to submit this model for evaluation.

Decision: I'll submit the current model (with dropout) for evaluation to see if the regularization improved the test MSE compared to the previous best of 0.9882.
